notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

S17 emits only a synthetic metadata rollback behavior receipt and does not execute rollback, retry, compensation, operator escalation, customer notification, incident tracing, observability events, runtime routes, service logic, runtime permission evaluation, AuthZ, permission engines, security trimming, audit writes, database/storage/product-state writes, review/approval/blocked-output writes, persistence/idempotency/lock/error store writes, UI creation, Claude runtime review, or real data use.
A preliminary RP00 validation run before evidence creation failed only on the expected missing CP00-013 evidence files; final RP00 validation is recorded after evidence creation.
